questions.q: A federal judge has ordered the Pentagon to restore press access, ruling that a revised policy ignored a prior court order. Which Secretary of Defense was criticized for this policy?
What is the primary reason cited for the surge in US consumer prices in March 2026?
options: The war with Iran and rising oil prices
A sudden increase in demand for electronics
questions.correctText: The war with Iran and rising oil prices

questions.q: The U.S. Postal Service is proposing to increase the price of a First-Class Mail Forever stamp. To what amount?
Maine is set to become the first state to implement a ban on data center construction. Until when would this ban last?
Emil Michael, a U.S. defense official overseeing AI, reaped millions from selling his stock in which artificial intelligence company?
